channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/VoltAgent — A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.
item.description: VoltAgent: a collection of brand design system DESIGN.md files for AI agents to generate matching UIs.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] anthropics/claude-cookbooks — A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.
item.description: Anthropic's claude-cookbooks repository on GitHub contains notebooks and recipes demonstrating practical applications of Claude.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] vxcontrol/pentagi — Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks
item.description: Pentagi is an autonomous AI agent system for performing penetration testing tasks.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/unclecode — 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN
item.description: Crawl4AI is an open-source web crawler and scraper designed for LLM applications.

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] SpaceXAI launches Grok 4.5, first Opus-class model post Cursor acquisition
item.description: [AINews] SpaceXAI launches Grok 4.5, first Opus-class model post Cursor acquisition

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Audio Sentiment Analysis via Distillation and Cross-Modal Integration of Generated Multilingual Transcripts
item.description: Method combines audio and multilingual text transcripts via cross-modal transformers for audio sentiment analysis, with knowledge distilled to audio-only model.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Healthier LLMs: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Public Health Question Answering
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation with hybrid retrieval improves public health question answering performance, enabling smaller language models to match larger ones without retrieval.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Ad Headline Generation using Self-Critical Masked Language Model
item.description: Researchers use reinforcement learning with masked language models to auto-generate e-commerce ad headlines that outperform both existing methods and human submissions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Gradient-Based Speech-to-Text Alignment for Any ASR Model: From CTC to Speech LLMs
item.description: New gradient-based method universally aligns speech-to-text word boundaries across all ASR models without retraining or modification.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LLMs Silently Correct African American English: Auditing and Mitigating Dialect Bias via Activation Steering
item.description: LLMs systematically convert African American English to Standard American English; researchers introduce auditing metrics and activation steering to mitigate this dialect bias.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Comprehensive Evaluation of Large Language Model Responses: A Multi-Factor Scoring System
item.description: Research proposes five-dimensional evaluation framework for assessing LLM responses; finds models excel at reasoning but struggle with complex factual accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MILES: Modular Instruction Memory with Learnable Selection for Self-Improving LLM Reasoning
item.description: MILES allows LLMs to improve test-time reasoning by dynamically accumulating and selectively retrieving step-wise memory across sequential problems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Riemannian Geometry for Pre-trained Language Model Embeddings
item.description: Riemannian Mean Pooling using Fréchet aggregation outperforms Euclidean pooling for sentence classification in pre-trained language model embeddings across multiple datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Behavior Leverage Imbalance in Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation
item.description: Multi-teacher distillation causes language models to over-call tools; Soft Clamp calibration reduces over-calling from 13.7% to 9.0% by addressing token-level imbalance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Text to Parameters: Predicting Item Parameters from Embedding Regularization with Reliability and Design Ceilings
item.description: Researchers predict psychometric item parameters from text embeddings, finding difficulty highly predictable but discrimination and pseudo-guessing impractical due to low reliability ceilings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluation of Multilingual Ability to Use Spatial Deictic Expressions in Vision-Language Models
item.description: Researchers develop multilingual benchmark showing vision-language models use spatial deictic expressions differently from humans, particularly for distance-based object reference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Understanding Interpretation Difficulty in Harmful Online Communication: Insights from Cybercrime Communities
item.description: Research on cybercrime Discord chats reveals that local context alone insufficient for humans and LLMs; external knowledge and larger models improve interpretation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Word-Level Digital Reader of the Prasthanatrayi with Sankara's Bhasya: Corpus, Method, and an Open, Offline Reading Aid for the Advaita Vedanta Canon
item.description: Researchers present an open, offline digital reader for Sanskrit texts with word-level morphological analysis and LLM-assisted verification.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluating RAG Metrics in Applied Contexts: An Experiment, Its Findings and Its Limitations
item.description: Study compares RAG metrics from four libraries against human evaluation on business Q&A data, identifying limitations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] R^3: Advertisement Compliance Rectification via Group-Relative Experience Extractor and Curriculum Reinforcement
item.description: R^3 framework automatically rectifies textual violations in video ads while maintaining advertiser intent using curriculum reinforcement learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TF-Engram: A Train-Free Engram with SSD-Backed Memory for Large Language Models
item.description: TF-Engram system integrates offline-built phrase memory into LLMs via GPU-DRAM-SSD hierarchy without retraining, improving downstream performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Transformer-based segmentation of prosodic boundaries in Brazilian Portuguese
item.description: Researchers fine-tune Whisper to segment prosodic boundaries in Brazilian Portuguese speech, achieving F1 scores of 0.731 on test data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DeLS-Spec: Decoupled Long-Short Contexts for Parallel Speculative Drafting
item.description: DeLS-Spec combines decoupled long-context and short-context experts for speculative LLM inference, reducing training costs compared to prior block-parallel drafting methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SynthAVE: Scalable Synthetic Labeling for E-Commerce with LLM-Arena Validation
item.description: SynthAVE validates synthetic e-commerce labels using a multi-LLM ensemble, achieving 95.2% agreement with human experts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Think Big, Search Small: Where Capacity Matters in Hierarchical Search Agents?
item.description: Hierarchical search agents benefit from asymmetric capacity: scaling task delegation improves accuracy 11 points versus 2.6 for execution, enabling smaller efficient models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PALS: Percentile-Aware Layerwise Sparsity for LLM Pruning
item.description: PALS improves LLM pruning by adjusting per-layer sparsity based on activation magnitudes, outperforming uniform Wanda on LLaMA-2-7B.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Future Confidence Distillation in Large Language Models
item.description: Paper introduces future confidence distillation, enabling LLMs to achieve post-solution-level confidence calibration using pre-solution representations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DiaLLM: An Investigation into the Robustness-Generation Gap in English Dialect Adaptation
item.description: DiaLLM shows large language models understand dialects but fail to generate them, revealing misalignment between metrics and actual dialectal quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Does Bielik Know What It Doesn't Know? Activation Dispersion Separates Entity Familiarity from Factual Reliability Across Model Scale
item.description: LLM activations detect entity familiarity at 95%+ accuracy but this signal plateaus while factual reliability improves with scale.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Noisy Traces to Root Causes: Structural Trajectory Analysis and Causal Extraction for Agent Optimization
item.description: STRACE framework improves agent optimization by filtering redundant execution traces and identifying causal root causes of failures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Co-LMLM: Continuous-Query Limited Memory Language Models
item.description: CO-LMLM queries externalized knowledge bases with continuous vectors, outperforming traditional LLMs in perplexity and factual accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning
item.description: SciReasoner improves structure-property predictions for proteins, molecules and crystals using structure-aware tokens for interpretable, mechanistic reasoning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reconfigurable Radiology Labels Without Relabeling
item.description: Pipeline converts chest X-ray reports into reconfigurable labels through dictionary edits, eliminating need to relabel datasets and reducing costs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Final Checkpoints Are Not Enough: Analyzing Latent Reasoning Faithfulness Along Training Trajectories
item.description: Analysis across training checkpoints shows latent reasoning methods' intermediate steps progressively lose causal faithfulness, with decay patterns varying by answer format.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Does In-Context Search Help? A Sampling-Complexity Theory of Reflection-Driven Reasoning
item.description: Theory shows in-context search achieves exponential improvement over zero-shot when reflections reliably identify mistakes, and this behavior is learnable via cross-entropy training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TriRoute: Unified Learned Routing for Joint Adaptive Attention, Experts, and KV-Cache Allocation
item.description: TriRoute introduces unified routing for jointly optimizing attention resolution, expert selection, and KV-cache allocation across language model layers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Quiet Failure in Calibrated Virtual Screening: Marginal Conformal Prediction Under-Covers the Minority Class, and a Class-Conditional Fix Recovers It
item.description: Conformal prediction under-covers minority classes on imbalanced datasets in drug discovery; class-conditional methods restore coverage guarantees.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] NEST: Tackling Dataset-Level Distribution Shifts via Regime-Oriented Mixture-of-Experts
item.description: NEST proposes a regime-oriented mixture-of-experts framework to handle dataset-level distribution shifts in multivariate time-series forecasting through unsupervised regime clustering and specialized expert kernels.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] D2PO: Optimizing Diffusion Samplers via Dynamic Preference
item.description: D2PO uses dynamic preference optimization to improve diffusion sampling policies by replacing static teacher supervision with iterative refinement.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Deep Reinforcement Learning for Reliability Based Bi-Objective Portfolio Optimization
item.description: Deep reinforcement learning framework optimizes portfolio returns and downside risk simultaneously under transaction costs and market constraints using PPO algorithm.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] STAGformer: A Spatio-temporal Agent Graph Transformer for Micro Mobility Demand Forecasting
item.description: STAGformer uses learnable agent tokens to reduce attention complexity, improving bike-sharing demand forecasting accuracy over state-of-the-art methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] WHERE to Generate Matters: Budget-Aware Synthetic Augmentation for Label Skewed Federated Learning
item.description: FedEAS addresses label skew in federated learning through entropy-adaptive synthetic data generation budgets, reducing computation cost by 94.1% while maintaining accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Inertia-1: An Open Exploration of Wearable Motion Foundation Models
item.description: Inertia-1 studies wearable motion foundation models using 18.2M hours of accelerometer data to optimize design choices for activity recognition, gait detection, and disease prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fingerprint, Not Blueprint: How Positional Schemes Set the Default Spectral Algebra of Attention
item.description: Positional encoding schemes create distinct spectral fingerprints in attention mechanisms that emerge during training but aren't strictly necessary for model capability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LLM-Guided Task-Semantic Field Factorization for Industrial Process Forecasting
item.description: LLM-guided semantic field factorization reduces industrial forecasting error by 6-25% through enriching time-series models with process documentation semantics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Open-Ended Scenario Reasoning for Specialist Model Adaptation
item.description: ROAM adapts frozen specialist models to new scenarios using LLM reasoning without retraining, achieving 20% error reduction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reward Valuation in Vision Language Models: Causal Mechanisms Underlying Anhedonia
item.description: Perturbing reward-anticipatory units in vision-language models induces anhedonia-like behavioral changes that parallel human depression-related reward deficits.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Cross-Trajectory Chimera Interventions Reveal Dissociable Roles of Weight Magnitude and Direction in Grokking
item.description: Chimera interventions reveal weight direction encodes transferable network circuits while magnitude only affects training susceptibility.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] STST-JEPA: Shallow-Target Spatio-Temporal Joint Embedding Prediction Architecture For EEG Self-Supervised Learning
item.description: STST-JEPA self-supervised transformer predicts brain age from EEG with 3.06-year MAE, pretrained on 47,703 sessions spanning ages 5-81.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Certificates Fail: A Unified Safety Framework for Embedded Neural Interface Models
item.description: Neural-interface robustness certificates can pass despite task accuracy collapse, necessitating operational safety auditing frameworks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Does Demand Response Increase Vulnerability to Cyber Attacks by Adversarial Data Modifications?
item.description: Adversarial attacks on electricity price forecasts can reduce demand response profits, though limited perturbations preserve approximately 90% of financial benefits.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Do Geometric Algebra Layers Beat Scalarization? A Controlled Study on SO(3)-Equivariant Vector Laws
item.description: Geometric algebra networks substantially outperform scalarization on compositional 3D tasks requiring nested group operations but not on simple ones.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Optimized Instance Alteration for Explaining and Assessing Robustness of Classifiers
item.description: Researchers propose an optimization method to identify misclassification causes and assess classifier robustness through sparse, interpretable instance modifications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] UASPL: Uncertainty-Aware Self-Paced Learning with Evidential Neural Networks
item.description: UASPL introduces uncertainty-aware self-paced learning using evidential neural networks to improve sample selection reliability during model training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] At-Grok Is Not Converged:A Measurement-Validity Audit for Grokking Representation Metrics
item.description: Networks continue compressing representations thousands of steps after generalizing; researchers audit grokking metrics and provide measurement methodology.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Rank-One Corner: How Much Value Equivalence Does a Task Need from a World Model?
item.description: World models capture task-relevant predictive structure proportional to training objective dimensionality, not model capacity or size.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Approximation Ratio for the Risk of Myopic Bayesian Active Learning for Linear Regression
item.description: Study proves a tight approximation ratio for greedy active learning in linear regression, proportional to maximum initial leverage scores.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Diffusion enabled Optimal Transport distances for graph matching
item.description: DsrFGW improves graph matching on sparse and noisy graphs by combining diffusion processes with optimal transport techniques.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Final Checkpoints Are Not Enough: Analyzing Latent Reasoning Faithfulness Along Training Trajectories
item.description: Latent reasoning faithfulness varies across training stages and answer formats, with causal reasoning contributions decaying during model optimization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Entropy-Guided Tensor Compression for Multimodal Federated Learning on Edge Devices
item.description: MESH-FL, an entropy-guided compression framework for multimodal federated learning on edge devices, achieves 56.8× compression while improving model accuracy.
